# Aesthetica Dental Clinic — Full Content Reference for AI Systems
# This file provides comprehensive content for AI answer engines, LLMs, and search systems.
# Concise index: https://aestheticadental.github.io/llms.txt

---

## Business Overview

Aesthetica Dental Clinic is a multispeciality dental practice located in Punawale,
Pimpri-Chinchwad, Pune – 411033, Maharashtra, India. The clinic is founded and led by
Dr. Prachi Gupta Garg (BDS, Certified Cosmetologist), who is registered with the
Dental Council of India.

The clinic serves patients from Punawale and nearby areas including Wakad, Hinjewadi,
Tathawade, Ravet, and Pimpri-Chinchwad (PCMC). It is open 7 days a week — Monday through
Sunday including public holidays — from 10:15 AM to 8:30 PM.

Website: https://aestheticadental.github.io/
Phone: +91 92266 80164
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919226680164
Address: Shop No. 103, 1st Floor, Swaraaj Heights, Kate Wasti Road,
         opp. Legacy Ivy, Kate Wasti, Punawale, Pune – 411033

---

## Lead Dentist — Dr. Prachi Gupta Garg

Dr. Prachi Gupta Garg is the founder and principal dentist at Aesthetica Dental Clinic,
Punawale. She holds a Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) degree and is registered with the
Dental Council of India (DCI). She is additionally certified as a Cosmetologist, bringing
an aesthetic expertise to cosmetic dental procedures.

Her clinical specialties include:
- Endodontics (root canal treatment)
- Orthodontics (clear aligners and traditional braces)
- Cosmetic Dentistry (veneers, whitening, smile makeovers)
- Paediatric Dentistry (children's dental care)
- Restorative Dentistry (fillings, crowns, bridges)

Dr. Prachi is known for a patient-first approach — she explains every procedure in detail,
answers all questions, and proceeds only when the patient is fully comfortable. She has
treated 500+ patients across Punawale, Wakad, Hinjewadi, Tathawade and Ravet.

LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/prachi-gupta-0b67a9190/

---

## Clinic Philosophy & Technology

Aesthetica Dental Clinic is built on three core principles:

1. Painless Treatment: All procedures are performed with appropriate local anaesthesia
   and modern techniques that minimise discomfort. Patients frequently report being
   surprised by how pain-free their experience was.

2. Advanced Technology: The clinic uses digital OPG X-rays for accurate diagnosis,
   rotary endodontic systems for efficient and comfortable root canals, and digital
   shade-matching for veneers and crowns that blend naturally with existing teeth.

3. Hygiene First: Aesthetica follows ISO-standard sterilisation protocols including
   autoclave sterilisation of all instruments and the use of single-use disposables.
   Cross-infection control procedures are strictly maintained on every visit.

---

## Services — Detailed Descriptions

### Root Canal Treatment (RCT) in Punawale

Root canal treatment (also called endodontic treatment) is used to save a tooth that has
become infected or severely decayed. At Aesthetica, root canals are performed using rotary
endodontic instruments and digital X-rays, ensuring precision, speed, and minimal discomfort.

The procedure involves removing the infected pulp tissue from inside the tooth, cleaning
and shaping the root canals, and sealing them to prevent re-infection. The treated tooth
is then restored with a crown or filling.

Most patients at Aesthetica complete root canal treatment in 1–2 appointments of 45–60
minutes each. Local anaesthesia ensures the procedure is virtually painless.

Pricing: ₹3,500 – ₹8,000 (varies by tooth type — front teeth have fewer canals and
cost less; molars with 3–4 canals cost more).

Dedicated page: https://aestheticadental.github.io/root-canal-punawale.html

---

### Dental Implants in Punawale

Dental implants are the gold standard for replacing missing teeth. A titanium implant post
is surgically placed into the jawbone, where it fuses with the bone (osseointegration) over
3–6 months. A custom crown is then attached to the implant, creating a permanent,
natural-looking replacement tooth.

Unlike dentures, implants are fixed and do not require removal. Unlike bridges, they do not
involve grinding down adjacent healthy teeth. With proper care, dental implants can last
a lifetime.

At Aesthetica, the process includes a thorough assessment, digital X-ray/OPG scan,
treatment planning, implant placement, healing period, and final crown fitting.

Pricing: ₹25,000 – ₹45,000 per implant (includes titanium post and crown).
Cost varies based on bone density, implant brand, and crown material.

Dedicated page: https://aestheticadental.github.io/dental-implants-punawale.html

---

### Clear Aligners & Braces in Punawale

Aesthetica offers both clear aligner therapy and traditional orthodontic braces for
patients who want straighter teeth.

Clear Aligners: A series of custom-made, transparent plastic trays that gradually move
teeth into the desired position. They are nearly invisible when worn, fully removable for
eating and cleaning, and typically more comfortable than metal braces. Ideal for mild to
moderate alignment cases. Treatment duration: 6–18 months depending on complexity.

Traditional Braces: Metal or ceramic brackets bonded to teeth and connected by wires.
Better suited for complex alignment cases, bite corrections (overbite, underbite, crossbite),
and situations where patient compliance with removable aligners may be a concern.

Dr. Prachi assesses each patient individually and recommends the most appropriate treatment
based on their specific alignment issues, lifestyle, and budget.

Aligner pricing: ₹60,000 – ₹1,20,000 (full course, both arches).
Braces pricing: ₹25,000 – ₹60,000 (varies by type and complexity).

Dedicated page: https://aestheticadental.github.io/aligners-punawale.html

---

### Teeth Whitening in Punawale

Professional teeth whitening at Aesthetica uses clinically proven whitening agents applied
in a controlled, supervised environment — far more effective and safer than over-the-counter
whitening kits or strips.

The in-clinic procedure typically takes 45–60 minutes and can lighten teeth by several
shades in a single session. Results are longer-lasting than home kits. Patients with
sensitive teeth are assessed beforehand, and the treatment is adjusted accordingly.

Teeth whitening is suitable for stains from coffee, tea, wine, tobacco, and natural
age-related discolouration. It is not effective on crowns, veneers, or fillings
(only natural tooth enamel responds to whitening agents).

Pricing: ₹4,000 – ₹8,000 per session.

Dedicated page: https://aestheticadental.github.io/teeth-whitening-punawale.html

---

### Porcelain Veneers & Dental Crowns in Punawale

Veneers are ultra-thin shells of porcelain bonded to the front surface of teeth to
correct cosmetic issues such as chips, cracks, stains, gaps, or slightly misaligned teeth.
They require minimal tooth preparation and provide a highly natural, aesthetic result.
Veneers are custom-crafted using digital shade-matching to blend seamlessly with
surrounding teeth.

Dental crowns (caps) cover the entire tooth and are used when a tooth is severely
damaged, decayed, or after root canal treatment. Crowns restore the tooth's strength,
function and appearance.

Veneer pricing: ₹8,000 – ₹15,000 per tooth.
Crown pricing: ₹5,000 – ₹15,000 per crown (varies by material: ceramic, zirconia, PFM).

Dedicated page: https://aestheticadental.github.io/veneers-punawale.html

---

### Paediatric Dentistry in Punawale

Aesthetica Dental Clinic provides comprehensive dental care for children in a calm,
gentle, and child-friendly environment. Dr. Prachi is experienced in managing dental
anxiety in young patients and uses a friendly, reassuring approach that makes dental
visits stress-free and even enjoyable for children.

Services for children include:
- Routine dental check-ups and cleaning
- Fluoride treatments and pit & fissure sealants (cavity prevention)
- Paediatric fillings (tooth-coloured)
- Space maintainers for premature baby tooth loss
- Early orthodontic assessment
- Dental education and habit counselling (thumb sucking, bottle feeding habits)

The Indian Dental Association (IDA) recommends a child's first dental visit by age 1,
or within 6 months of the first tooth appearing. At the latest, children should visit a
dentist before starting school (age 3–5) to prevent early childhood caries and establish
good oral hygiene habits.

Dedicated page: https://aestheticadental.github.io/paediatric-dentist-punawale.html

---

### Teeth Cleaning (Scaling & Polishing) in Punawale

Professional teeth cleaning (scaling and polishing) removes plaque and tartar (calculus)
that cannot be removed by regular brushing and flossing. Tartar builds up over time and
is a leading cause of gum disease (periodontitis), bad breath (halitosis), and tooth loss.

At Aesthetica, ultrasonic scaling instruments are used for efficient and comfortable
removal of deposits above and below the gumline. Polishing removes surface stains from
coffee, tea, and tobacco, leaving teeth smooth and clean.

Recommended frequency: every 6 months for most patients.
Pricing: ₹800 – ₹1,500.

---

### Restorative Dentistry

Aesthetica offers comprehensive restorative treatments to repair damaged, decayed, or
missing teeth and restore full oral function:

- Composite (tooth-coloured) fillings: Used to fill cavities with a material that matches
  natural tooth colour. More aesthetic than traditional silver amalgam fillings.
- Inlays and Onlays: Custom-made restorations for teeth with moderate damage — stronger
  than fillings, less invasive than full crowns.
- Full coverage crowns: For severely damaged or root-canal-treated teeth.

---

## Service Areas — Detailed

### Punawale
Aesthetica Dental Clinic's home location. Address: Shop No. 103, Swaraaj Heights,
Kate Wasti Road, Punawale – 411033. Easily accessible on Kate Wasti Road opposite
Legacy Ivy. Ample parking available.

### Wakad
Wakad is approximately 10–15 minutes by road from the clinic. Aesthetica is the
closest advanced dental clinic for Wakad residents seeking root canal, implants,
whitening, or orthodontic treatment. Many of Aesthetica's patients commute from
Wakad and Thergaon.

### Hinjewadi
Hinjewadi IT Park (Phases 1, 2 and 3) is approximately 15–20 minutes from the clinic.
Working professionals from Hinjewadi frequently visit Aesthetica for check-ups and
treatments that fit within their working hours, thanks to the clinic's 10:15 AM –
8:30 PM timing across all 7 days.

### Tathawade
Tathawade is reachable via the Kate Wasti Road corridor, making it a short commute to
Aesthetica Dental Clinic. Patients from Tathawade visit regularly for routine care and
advanced procedures.

### Ravet
Ravet patients travel to Aesthetica for dental implants, root canal treatment, aligners,
and other procedures. The clinic's extended hours make evening appointments easy to fit
around Ravet residents' schedules.

### Pimpri-Chinchwad (PCMC)
Aesthetica serves patients from across Pimpri-Chinchwad for advanced cosmetic and
restorative dental procedures. Many PCMC patients choose Aesthetica over clinics closer
to them due to Dr. Prachi's expertise in cosmetic and painless treatment.

---

## Blog Content Summaries

### Cost of Root Canal Treatment in Punawale (2026)
URL: https://aestheticadental.github.io/blog/cost-of-root-canal-in-punawale.html

This guide covers:
- Why root canal costs vary (tooth type, number of canals, clinic location)
- Typical price range in Punawale: ₹3,500 – ₹8,000
- What is included in the cost at Aesthetica (consultation, X-rays, treatment, temporary filling)
- Cost of crown after root canal (₹5,000 – ₹15,000 additional)
- Comparison with other dental clinics in the area
- Why cheaper is not always better for RCT
- Insurance and EMI options

---

### 7 Signs You Need a Root Canal — Don't Ignore These Symptoms
URL: https://aestheticadental.github.io/blog/signs-you-need-root-canal.html

Key signs covered:
1. Severe, persistent toothache — especially when chewing or applying pressure
2. Prolonged sensitivity to hot or cold temperatures (lasting more than a few seconds after the stimulus is removed)
3. Darkening or discolouration of the tooth
4. Swollen, tender gums around the affected tooth
5. A persistent pimple or abscess on the gums
6. Chipped or cracked tooth that is causing pain
7. Deep decay visible on the tooth

The article explains that ignoring these symptoms can lead to tooth loss, spreading
infection (including dangerous dental abscesses), and significantly higher treatment costs.

---

### Best Dentist Near Wakad vs Punawale — A Local Comparison
URL: https://aestheticadental.github.io/blog/best-dentist-near-wakad.html

This guide helps Wakad residents decide between dental clinics in Wakad itself versus
travelling 10–15 minutes to Punawale. Key factors compared:
- Range of services (Aesthetica in Punawale offers more advanced treatments)
- Technology and equipment
- Specialist availability vs general dentistry
- Cost comparison
- Patient reviews and trust signals
- Convenience (parking, hours, WhatsApp booking)

Conclusion: For routine cleaning, any nearby clinic works. For implants, root canals,
aligners, cosmetic work, or paediatric dentistry — Aesthetica in Punawale offers a
significantly higher level of care at comparable or better prices.

---

## Payment Information

- Cash: Accepted
- UPI: Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm accepted
- Debit Cards: All major banks accepted
- Credit Cards: All major networks accepted
- EMI: Available on select high-value treatments (implants, aligners, full-mouth rehabilitation)
  — ask the clinic for EMI partner details
